//: memento — automatic recall-before-act for Devin CLI. Copy to .devin/hooks.v1.json in your workspace (install.sh does this for you). Devin runs `devin-memento-hook` on each event; it injects the relevant team memories + standing lessons into Devin's context before it acts. Fails safe (never blocks). For team mode set MEMENTO_DB_URL / MEMENTO_NAMESPACE in Devin's environment.
